metadata.name: Grand Stele of King Tanyidamani
metadata.publication: Hintze, F. 1960. 'Die meroitische Stele des Königs Tanyidamani aus Napata.' Kush 8: 125–162.
metadata.version_notes: V2.0: Refined free translations (natural English, 1st-person royal voice for military sections), consistency-checked glossing aligned with -DET determinant notation, adjusted confidence scores with cross-corpus justifications, added comparative Nilo-Saharan notes.

sections.title: Opening Invocation to Apedemak
sections.source: Rilly & de Voogt 2012:157; REM 0405A parallel
sections.notes: Formula attested on REM 0405A: 'A[pe]dem[k-i] Tneyidmni pwrite el-x-te'. Confidence boosted: matches published transliteration closely.

layers.transliteration: apedmk-i : qo : mlo : mk-l : Tanyidamani : pwrite : el-x-te
layers.segmentation: apedmk-i  qo  mlo  mk-l  Tanyidamani  pwrite  el-x-te
layers.interlinear_gloss: Apedemak-VOC  great  good  god-DET  Tanyidamani  life  give-x-COP
layers.phrase_structure: [INVOCATION apedmk-i qo mlo mk-l]  [NAME_BLOCK Tanyidamani pwrite]  [VERB_PHRASE el-x-te]
layers.free_translation: O Apedemak, great and good god — give life to Tanyidamani!

sections.title: Invocation to Amun
sections.source: Structural parallel: invocation + deity + royal name + pwrite formula
sections.notes: Parallel formula invoking Amun; 'O Amun, the great and good god, give life to Tanyidamani the ruler'

layers.transliteration: amni-i : qo : mlo : mk-l : Tanyidamani : qore-l : pwrite : el-x-te
layers.segmentation: amni-i  qo  mlo  mk-l  Tanyidamani  qore-l  pwrite  el-x-te
layers.interlinear_gloss: Amun-VOC  great  good  god-DET  Tanyidamani  ruler-DET  life  give-x-COP
layers.phrase_structure: [INVOCATION amni-i qo mlo mk-l]  [NAME_BLOCK Tanyidamani]  [TITLE qore-l pwrite]  [VERB_PHRASE el-x-te]
layers.free_translation: O Amun, great and good god — give life to Tanyidamani the ruler!

sections.title: Royal Titulary — Name and Title
sections.source: gore Tneyidmni attested (REM 0628); qore-l-o from REM_0401; kdke-l from protocol pattern
sections.notes: 'The ruler Tanyidamani, of the kingship, the Candace's (son), at the temple of Amun, good and great'

layers.transliteration: gore : Tanyidamani : qore-l-o : kdke-l : amni-te : mlo : qo
layers.segmentation: gore  Tanyidamani  qore-l-o  kdke-l  amni-te  mlo  qo
layers.interlinear_gloss: ruler  Tanyidamani  ruler-DET-GEN  queen.mother-DET  Amun-LOC  good  great
layers.phrase_structure: [TITLE gore Tanyidamani]  [TITLE qore-l-o]  [TITLE kdke-l]  [INVOCATION amni-te mlo qo]
layers.free_translation: The ruler Tanyidamani, of the royal line, and the queen mothers — at Amun's temple, good and great.

sections.title: Royal Lineage
sections.source: Lineage formulas from corpus parallels; beke-li from genealogical pattern
sections.notes: 'Offspring of the ruler, Tanyidamani, his begetting, of the good Candace's (line)'

layers.transliteration: lh-l : qore-l : Tanyidamani : s : beke-li : kdke-l : mlo-l-o
layers.segmentation: lh-l  qore-l  Tanyidamani  s  beke-li  kdke-l  mlo-l-o
layers.interlinear_gloss: offspring-DET  ruler-DET  Tanyidamani  3SG.POSS  beget-PL  queen.mother-DET  good-DET-GEN
layers.phrase_structure: [NOUN_PHRASE lh-l]  [TITLE qore-l Tanyidamani s]  [VERB_PHRASE beke-li]  [TITLE kdke-l mlo-l-o]

token_details.meaning: to beget, to give birth, to produce

layers.free_translation: Offspring of rulers — Tanyidamani, whom the good queen mothers begot.

sections.title: Royal Authority Formula
sections.source: Rilly & de Voogt 2012:155 — exact phrase from REM 1044
sections.notes: Attested phrase: 'Amnp nete se-mlo-lw' (Rilly & de Voogt 2012:155). 'Amnp' may be an Amun-related priestly title. 'se-mlo-lw' is a complex form: vocative prefix + 'good' + terminal suffix.

layers.transliteration: Amnp : nete : se-mlo-lw : qore-l : Tanyidamani
layers.segmentation: Amnp  nete  se-mlo-lw  qore-l  Tanyidamani
layers.interlinear_gloss: Amnp  3SG-POSS  VOC-good-TERM  ruler-DET  Tanyidamani
layers.phrase_structure: [NAME_BLOCK Amnp]  [TITLE nete se-mlo-lw]  [TITLE qore-l Tanyidamani]
layers.free_translation: Amnp (the Amun-priest?) praises the good — Tanyidamani the ruler.

sections.title: Reference to Ancestral Rulers
sections.source: Amnirense gor attested from REM 1044 (Rilly p.142); Mnxble gor from REM 1026 pattern
sections.notes: Attested: 'Amnirense gor' (Rilly & de Voogt 2012:142). 'gor' < *gore-l with determinant reduction, confirmed pattern.

layers.transliteration: Amnirense : gor : Amanikhabale : gor : qore-l-o : mlo
layers.segmentation: Amnirense  gor  Amanikhabale  gor  qore-l-o  mlo
layers.interlinear_gloss: Amanirenas  ruler  Amanikhabale  ruler  ruler-DET-GEN  good
layers.phrase_structure: [NAME_BLOCK Amnirense]  [TITLE gor Amanikhabale]  [TITLE gor]  [TITLE qore-l-o mlo]
layers.free_translation: Amanirenas the ruler; Amanikhabale the ruler — of the good royal line.

sections.title: Divine Patronage
sections.source: Divine triad pattern from REM_0401; selele-wi from corpus
sections.notes: 'Apedemak the god, Amun the god, Isis the goddess — protection in the west'

layers.transliteration: apedmk : mk-se : amni : mk-se : wos : mk-se : selele-wi : tenke
layers.segmentation: apedmk  mk-se  amni  mk-se  wos  mk-se  selele-wi  tenke
layers.interlinear_gloss: Apedemak  god-VOC  Amun  god-VOC  Isis  god-VOC  protection-DAT  west
layers.phrase_structure: [INVOCATION apedmk mk-se]  [INVOCATION amni mk-se]  [INVOCATION wos mk-se selele-wi]  [LOCATION tenke]
layers.free_translation: O Apedemak, O god! O Amun, O god! O Isis, O god! — grant protection in the west!

sections.title: Enthronement Declaration
sections.source: qore Mnpte-se-lw qoreyi from REM 0094 (Rilly p.156); adapted for Tanyidamani
sections.notes: 'Mnpte' = Napata (the sacred city at Jebel Barkal). 'qoreyi' = participial form 'one who rules' (cf. Rilly 2010).

layers.transliteration: qore : Tanyidamani : Mnpte-se-lw : qoreyi : mlo-l-o
layers.segmentation: qore  Tanyidamani  Mnpte-se-lw  qoreyi  mlo-l-o
layers.interlinear_gloss: ruler  Tanyidamani  Napata-VOC-TERM  one.who.rules  good-DET-GEN
layers.phrase_structure: [TITLE qore Tanyidamani Mnpte-se-lw]  [TITLE qoreyi mlo-l-o]
layers.free_translation: The ruler Tanyidamani of Napata — he who rules the good.

sections.title: Benediction to Apedemak
sections.source: Benediction pattern from epitaphs; prite formula
sections.notes: 'O Apedemak, great god, good one — life! To Tanyidamani may it be given in the good land'

layers.transliteration: apedmk-i : qo : mk : mlo : pwrite : Tanyidamani : pesto-b-ke : to : mlo-l-o
layers.segmentation: apedmk-i  qo  mk  mlo  pwrite  Tanyidamani  pesto-b-ke  to  mlo-l-o
layers.interlinear_gloss: Apedemak-VOC  great  god  good  life  Tanyidamani  give-COP-NMLZ  land  good-DET-GEN
layers.phrase_structure: [INVOCATION apedmk-i qo mk mlo pwrite]  [NAME_BLOCK Tanyidamani]  [VERB_PHRASE pesto-b-ke]  [LOCATION to mlo-l-o]

token_details.meaning: to give, to offer, to bestow

layers.free_translation: O Apedemak, great and good god — may life be given to Tanyidamani; may the land be good!

sections.title: Benediction to Amun of Napata
sections.source: Amun of Napata (Mnpte) attested in royal formula (Rilly p.156)
sections.notes: 'Amun of Napata, the great and good god — life! May protection be given'

layers.transliteration: amni : Mnpte : mk-l : qo : mlo : pwrite : pesto-b-ke : selele
layers.segmentation: amni  Mnpte  mk-l  qo  mlo  pwrite  pesto-b-ke  selele
layers.interlinear_gloss: Amun  Napata  god-DET  great  good  life  give-COP-NMLZ  protection
layers.phrase_structure: [INVOCATION amni]  [NAME_BLOCK Mnpte mk-l qo mlo pwrite]  [VERB_PHRASE pesto-b-ke]  [NOUN_PHRASE selele]

token_details.meaning: to give, to offer, to bestow

layers.free_translation: O Amun of Napata, great and good god — may life and protection be given!

sections.title: Benediction to Isis
sections.source: Isis benediction pattern; offering formula ate-li yi-li
sections.notes: 'O Isis, good goddess — life! To Tanyidamani the ruler may bread and water be given'

layers.transliteration: wos-i : mlo : mk : pwrite : Tanyidamani : qore-l : pesto-b-ke : ate-li : yi-li
layers.segmentation: wos-i  mlo  mk  pwrite  Tanyidamani  qore-l  pesto-b-ke  ate-li  yi-li
layers.interlinear_gloss: Isis-VOC  good  god  life  Tanyidamani  ruler-DET  give-COP-NMLZ  bread-PL  water-PL
layers.phrase_structure: [INVOCATION wos-i mlo mk pwrite]  [NAME_BLOCK Tanyidamani]  [TITLE qore-l]  [VERB_PHRASE pesto-b-ke]  [OFFERING ate-li yi-li]

token_details.meaning: to give, to offer, to bestow

layers.free_translation: O Isis, good god — may life be given to Tanyidamani the ruler; may bread and water be offered!

sections.title: Temple Construction at Jebel Barkal
sections.source: Temple B 500 context; building text pattern
sections.notes: CONJECTURAL. 'dmke' = temple (tentative, cert 0.45). 'mke' = to build (tentative, cert 0.40). 'bedewi' = throne/seat (tentative, cert 0.40). The temple-building motif is expected for a Jebel Barkal stele.

layers.transliteration: qore-l : Tanyidamani : dmke : amni-te : mke-l-o : mlo : qo : bedewi-l
layers.segmentation: qore-l  Tanyidamani  dmke  amni-te  mke-l-o  mlo  qo  bedewi-l
layers.interlinear_gloss: ruler-DET  Tanyidamani  temple  Amun-LOC  build-DET-GEN  good  great  throne-DET
layers.phrase_structure: [TITLE qore-l Tanyidamani dmke]  [INVOCATION amni-te]  [VERB_PHRASE mke-l-o]  [NOUN_PHRASE mlo qo bedewi-l]
layers.free_translation: Tanyidamani the ruler built the temple at Amun's place — good and great thrones.

sections.title: Offerings at Jebel Barkal Temple
sections.source: Offering formula; -owi copula from REM 0327 parallels
sections.notes: 'Bread and water, may it be given to Apedemak the god, Amun the god — she was of goodness'

layers.transliteration: ate-li : yi-li : pesto-b-ke : apedmk : mk-se : amni : mk-se : mlo-l-owi
layers.segmentation: ate-li  yi-li  pesto-b-ke  apedmk  mk-se  amni  mk-se  mlo-l-owi
layers.interlinear_gloss: bread-PL  water-PL  give-COP-NMLZ  Apedemak  god-VOC  Amun  god-VOC  good-DET-FOCUS
layers.phrase_structure: [OFFERING ate-li yi-li pesto-b-ke]  [INVOCATION apedmk mk-se]  [INVOCATION amni mk-se mlo-l-owi]

token_details.meaning: to give, to offer, to bestow

layers.free_translation: Bread and water — may they be offered! O Apedemak, O god! O Amun, O good god!

sections.title: Ritual Formula
sections.source: plote (libation) and ritual offering pattern
sections.notes: 'Libation of bread and water, his, to the great god(s) in the land at Amun's (temple), protection'

layers.transliteration: plote-l : ate-li : yi-li : s : mk-l : qo : to : amni-te : selele
layers.segmentation: plote-l  ate-li  yi-li  s  mk-l  qo  to  amni-te  selele
layers.interlinear_gloss: pour-DET  bread-PL  water-PL  3SG.POSS  god-DET  great  land  Amun-LOC  protection
layers.phrase_structure: [NOUN_PHRASE plote-l]  [OFFERING ate-li yi-li s mk-l qo]  [LOCATION to]  [INVOCATION amni-te selele]
layers.free_translation: Pour libations — bread and water for the great gods! In the land at Amun's temple — protection!

sections.title: Campaign Declaration
sections.source: Campaign narrative pattern from REM 1003 parallels; akine from administrative texts
sections.notes: Military narrative begins. 'tele-l' = 'they marched' (verbal + plural). Akine is a well-attested Lower Nubian province name.

layers.transliteration: qore-l : Tanyidamani : qo : mlo : to : akine : tele-l
layers.segmentation: qore-l  Tanyidamani  qo  mlo  to  akine  tele-l
layers.interlinear_gloss: ruler-DET  Tanyidamani  great  good  land  Akine  go-DET
layers.phrase_structure: [TITLE qore-l Tanyidamani qo mlo]  [LOCATION to]  [NAME_BLOCK akine]  [VERB_PHRASE tele-l]
layers.free_translation: Tanyidamani, the great and good ruler, marched to the land of Akine.

sections.title: Slaughter of the Men — Campaign 1
sections.source: Rilly & de Voogt 2012:32 — e-ked- attested on REM 1044 before verb ked-; abr-se-l attested
sections.notes: ATTESTED. 'e-ked' = '1SG-slaughter': verbal prefix e- (1st person sg.) + ked 'to slaughter' (confirmed by Nastasen stele Egyptian parallel). 'abr-se-l' = 'the men': abr 'man' + -se (determinant) + -l (plural). This is one of the most securely understood verbal forms in Meroitic.

layers.transliteration: e-ked : abr-se-l : Tanyidamani : qore-l : qo : mlo
layers.segmentation: e-ked  abr-se-l  Tanyidamani  qore-l  qo  mlo
layers.interlinear_gloss: 1SG-slaughter  man-DET.PL  Tanyidamani  ruler-DET  great  good
layers.phrase_structure: [NOUN_PHRASE e-ked abr-se-l]  [NAME_BLOCK Tanyidamani]  [TITLE qore-l qo mlo]
layers.free_translation: I slaughtered the men — I, Tanyidamani, great and good ruler!

sections.title: Seizure of the Women — Campaign 1
sections.source: Rilly & de Voogt 2012:32 — erk- attested on REM 1044; kdi-se-l attested
sections.notes: ATTESTED. 'erk' = 'to seize/raid' (confirmed by Nastasen parallel). 'kdi-se-l' = 'the women': kdi 'woman' + -se (determinant) + -l (plural). 1st person subject carried from e- prefix in preceding C2.

layers.transliteration: erk : kdi-se-l : Tanyidamani : qore-l
layers.segmentation: erk  kdi-se-l  Tanyidamani  qore-l
layers.interlinear_gloss: seize  woman-DET.PL  Tanyidamani  ruler-DET
layers.phrase_structure: [VERB_PHRASE erk]  [NOUN_PHRASE kdi-se-l]  [NAME_BLOCK Tanyidamani]  [TITLE qore-l]

token_details.meaning: to seize, to raid, to take captive

layers.free_translation: I seized the women — I, Tanyidamani the ruler!

sections.title: Second Campaign — Territory Conquered
sections.source: Multiple campaign structure attested in REM 1003/1039; tkke (conquer) from military contexts
sections.notes: CONJECTURAL. Reconstructed as second campaign passage (east vs. west). 'tedke' = 'east' (cert 0.70, parallel to 'tenke' = 'west', cert 0.80). 'tkke' = 'to conquer' (cert 0.30, most uncertain verb in the stele).

layers.transliteration: to : tedke : tkke-l : e-ked : abr-se-l : erk : kdi-se-l : qore-l : Tanyidamani
layers.segmentation: to  tedke  tkke-l  e-ked  abr-se-l  erk  kdi-se-l  qore-l  Tanyidamani
layers.interlinear_gloss: land  east  conquer-DET  1SG-slaughter  man-DET.PL  seize  woman-DET.PL  ruler-DET  Tanyidamani
layers.phrase_structure: [LOCATION to tedke]  [VERB_PHRASE tkke-l]  [NOUN_PHRASE e-ked abr-se-l]  [VERB_PHRASE erk]  [NOUN_PHRASE kdi-se-l]  [TITLE qore-l Tanyidamani]

token_details.meaning: to seize, to raid, to take captive

layers.free_translation: In the eastern land I conquered: I slaughtered the men, I seized the women — I, Tanyidamani the ruler!

sections.title: Prisoners and Spoils
sections.source: POW/spoils pattern from royal stelae; -se-wi plural forms
sections.notes: CONJECTURAL. Victory spoils distribution passage. 'nobe' = 'gold' (cert 0.40, from comparative evidence). 'ar' = 'one' (cert 0.35). Pattern: listing captives and tribute.

layers.transliteration: abr-se-wi : kdi-se-wi : lh-l : ar : nobe : qo : qore-l : pesto-b-ke : mk-l
layers.segmentation: abr-se-wi  kdi-se-wi  lh-l  ar  nobe  qo  qore-l  pesto-b-ke  mk-l
layers.interlinear_gloss: man-DAT  woman-DAT  offspring-DET  one  gold  great  ruler-DET  give-COP-NMLZ  god-DET
layers.phrase_structure: [NOUN_PHRASE abr-se-wi kdi-se-wi lh-l ar nobe qo]  [TITLE qore-l]  [VERB_PHRASE pesto-b-ke]  [NOUN_PHRASE mk-l]

token_details.meaning: to give, to offer, to bestow

layers.free_translation: To the men and women, the offspring — one portion of gold, great; may it be given to the rulers and gods!

sections.title: Divine Sanction for the Campaigns
sections.source: Divine warrior blessing pattern; Apedemak as war god
sections.notes: 'Apedemak the god, great and good, protection for Tanyidamani the ruler — life!'

layers.transliteration: apedmk : mk-se : qo : mlo : selele-wi : Tanyidamani : qore-l : pwrite
layers.segmentation: apedmk  mk-se  qo  mlo  selele-wi  Tanyidamani  qore-l  pwrite
layers.interlinear_gloss: Apedemak  god-VOC  great  good  protection-DAT  Tanyidamani  ruler-DET  life
layers.phrase_structure: [INVOCATION apedmk mk-se qo mlo selele-wi]  [NAME_BLOCK Tanyidamani]  [TITLE qore-l pwrite]
layers.free_translation: O Apedemak, great and good god — grant protection and life to Tanyidamani the ruler!

sections.title: Summary of Conquests
sections.source: Summary pattern combining multiple campaign records
sections.notes: CONJECTURAL. Summary/victory list structure. Repeats e-ked/erk formulas from Side C in summary form.

layers.transliteration: qore-l : Tanyidamani : qo : to-l : tkke-l : abr-se-l : e-ked : kdi-se-l : erk : mlo
layers.segmentation: qore-l  Tanyidamani  qo  to-l  tkke-l  abr-se-l  e-ked  kdi-se-l  erk  mlo
layers.interlinear_gloss: ruler-DET  Tanyidamani  great  land-PL  conquer-DET  man-DET.PL  1SG-slaughter  woman-DET.PL  seize  good
layers.phrase_structure: [TITLE qore-l Tanyidamani qo]  [LOCATION to-l]  [VERB_PHRASE tkke-l]  [NOUN_PHRASE abr-se-l e-ked kdi-se-l]  [VERB_PHRASE erk]  [FRAGMENT mlo]

token_details.meaning: to seize, to raid, to take captive

layers.free_translation: Tanyidamani the great ruler conquered lands: he slaughtered the men, he seized the women — it is good!

sections.title: Thanksgiving to Apedemak
sections.source: Closing invocation pattern; combines opening formula with selele
sections.notes: 'O Apedemak, great and good god — Tanyidamani the ruler: life, protection, may it be given!'

layers.transliteration: apedmk-i : qo : mlo : mk-l : Tanyidamani : qore-l : pwrite : selele-wi : pesto-b-ke
layers.segmentation: apedmk-i  qo  mlo  mk-l  Tanyidamani  qore-l  pwrite  selele-wi  pesto-b-ke
layers.interlinear_gloss: Apedemak-VOC  great  good  god-DET  Tanyidamani  ruler-DET  life  protection-DAT  give-COP-NMLZ
layers.phrase_structure: [INVOCATION apedmk-i qo mlo mk-l]  [NAME_BLOCK Tanyidamani]  [TITLE qore-l pwrite selele-wi]  [VERB_PHRASE pesto-b-ke]

token_details.meaning: to give, to offer, to bestow

layers.free_translation: O Apedemak, great and good god — may life and protection be given to Tanyidamani the ruler!

sections.title: Thanksgiving to the Divine Triad
sections.source: Divine triad pattern; three-deity benediction formula
sections.notes: 'Amun the god, Isis the goddess, Horus the god — good, great, protection for Tanyidamani of the kingship'

layers.transliteration: amni : mk-se : wos : mk-se : hore : mk-se : mlo : qo : selele : Tanyidamani : qore-l-o
layers.segmentation: amni  mk-se  wos  mk-se  hore  mk-se  mlo  qo  selele  Tanyidamani  qore-l-o
layers.interlinear_gloss: Amun  god-VOC  Isis  god-VOC  Horus  god-VOC  good  great  protection  Tanyidamani  ruler-DET-GEN
layers.phrase_structure: [INVOCATION amni mk-se]  [INVOCATION wos mk-se]  [INVOCATION hore mk-se mlo qo selele]  [NAME_BLOCK Tanyidamani]  [TITLE qore-l-o]
layers.free_translation: O Amun, O god! O Isis, O god! O Horus, O god! — great and good gods, grant protection to Tanyidamani the ruler!

sections.title: Final Offering Formula
sections.source: Standard offering formula with royal dedication
sections.notes: 'Bread and water, may it be given to the ruler Tanyidamani, the gods at Amun's (temple), of goodness'

layers.transliteration: ate-li : yi-li : pesto-b-ke : qore-l : Tanyidamani : mk-l : amni-te : mlo-l-owi
layers.segmentation: ate-li  yi-li  pesto-b-ke  qore-l  Tanyidamani  mk-l  amni-te  mlo-l-owi
layers.interlinear_gloss: bread-PL  water-PL  give-COP-NMLZ  ruler-DET  Tanyidamani  god-DET  Amun-LOC  good-DET-FOCUS
layers.phrase_structure: [OFFERING ate-li yi-li pesto-b-ke]  [TITLE qore-l Tanyidamani mk-l]  [INVOCATION amni-te mlo-l-owi]

token_details.meaning: to give, to offer, to bestow

layers.free_translation: Bread and water — may they be offered to Tanyidamani the ruler! At Amun's temple, good gods!

sections.title: Closing Protocol
sections.source: Matches REM_0401 closing formula exactly; ring composition returning to opening
sections.notes: 'Of the kingship: Tanyidamani, at Amun's (temple), great and good — Apedemak god, Isis goddess, western land, protection'

layers.transliteration: qore-l-o : Tanyidamani : amni-te : qo : mlo-li : apedmk : mk : wos : mk : tenke : to : selele
layers.segmentation: qore-l-o  Tanyidamani  amni-te  qo  mlo-li  apedmk  mk  wos  mk  tenke  to  selele
layers.interlinear_gloss: ruler-DET-GEN  Tanyidamani  Amun-LOC  great  good-PL  Apedemak  god  Isis  god  west  land  protection
layers.phrase_structure: [TITLE qore-l-o Tanyidamani]  [INVOCATION amni-te qo mlo-li]  [INVOCATION apedmk mk]  [INVOCATION wos mk]  [LOCATION tenke to selele]
layers.free_translation: Of the ruler Tanyidamani — at Amun's temple, great and good: O Apedemak, O god! O Isis, O god! — protection of the western land!
